title: Maranatha (versão inglês)
html: Intro: C F Am G C F I say you are my light, you are my salvation, Am G and I will surrender to you. c F |Am If I am on your side, secure your hand and fear nothing, G this is my choose. F G Am C |G Oh, oh, oh, you are holy, and will amaze; F G Am C G Oh, oh, oh, you are worthy of praise. Dm Em Am Lord, Only I trust you, I fear nothing to lose |G |Dm And ahead I will because I know that you are alive Em Am One day he will come back from heaven to get us G C It's perfect all he does, hallelujah ; ( C F Am G )
